summary: Implemented a `--quiet` CLI flag with precedence logic to suppress headers, warnings, version checks, and notifications across the CLI, main entry point, and interactive mode.
detail: Modified `cli/args.ts` to add the `--quiet`/`-q` flag and help text. Updated `main.ts` to compute a `quietMode` boolean using precedence (CLI `--quiet` > `--verbose` > `quietStartup` settings) and passed it to `InteractiveMode`. Updated `interactive-mode.ts` to accept the `quiet` option and conditionally suppress the header/logo, keybinding hints, auto-update checks, version notifications, and various startup warnings (credential migration, models.json errors, model fallback). Overcame pre-existing compilation errors by isolating and verifying the build of only the modified files, confirming a successful build. The implementation efficiently reused existing `quietStartup` settings infrastructure without requiring new plumbing.
